West Michigan Art Therapy

  • About

West Michigan Art Therapy
  • Heal Through Creativity
  • Expert Art Therapy for All Ages
  • Transform Your Story with Art
  • Where Art Meets Wellness
Located in West Olive along Michigan's vibrant "art coast," West Michigan Art Therapy serves a region renowned for its rich cultural and creative spirit. As mental health care evolves and alternative therapies gain recognition, we provide professional art therapy services in a community that deeply values both healing and artistic expression.
Discover More

Amy Rostollan-Hamman, ATR-BC

Amy is a Board-Certified Art Therapist with over over 15 years of experience helping individuals of all ages find healing through creative expression. With a person-centered approach, she guides clients facing various challenges to discover the transformative power of art therapy in their unique journeys.
